caption: Two men are seen in a room, positioned in front of a television and a soundbar. The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt and maintains a neutral, attentive expression. The man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace, holding his hand to his mouth in a thoughtful or concerned gesture. Behind them, a shelf holds a collection of CDs and other media. The television screen displays a smaller video within it, showing a dark scene with a figure and the caption, "is beyond the thoughts and capacity of bu enemy." At the top of the television screen, large yellow text reads "OUR STUPID REACTIONS," though in the first two frames, the word "STUPID" is partially obscured. Across the sequence, the men remain mostly stationary, while the screen content and the yellow text at the top shift slightly.
